title: The lost poops of the Deepercutt! D:
description:
I haven't made a poop in a while due to all the homework I've been getting in school this year so I though I should post SOMETHING....

Now the order these poops go in are newest to oldest...
The AVGN poop was made right before "This game is my fucking nightmare" and the pokemon poop was made before the second Teen Titans poop, the scene with luigi was actually the last scene I tried to work on in my unfinished Mario poop and the Brawl poop isn't actually unfinished. Unclechuck made a collab with all of the brawl cutscenes and that last poop was part of collab I joined, some of you may have seen it.
